_comment: 2002 賽季導言 facts pack。每個 verified:true 的 claim 由 scripts/check-season-intros.py 內建查詢對 data/f1/db.sqlite 重查驗證；導言中每個阿拉伯數字都必須落在本檔 verified claims 的值集合內。external-history 句屬常識性歷史背景、不進機械對帳。

claims.source: sqlite: SELECT 1 FROM seasons WHERE year=2002
sqlite: SELECT MAX(round) FROM races WHERE season=2002

claims.text: 舒馬克贏下 11 場分站冠軍
claims.source: sqlite: SELECT wins FROM driver_standings WHERE season=2002 AND position=1

claims.text: 每一站都站上頒獎台（17 戰全數登台）
claims.source: sqlite: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM results WHERE season=2002 AND driver_id='michael_schumacher' AND position_text IN ('1','2','3')

claims.text: 第 11 站數學上鎖定衛冕
claims.source: clinch 計算：逐站累計積分，首個「領先＞剩餘站數×該季單場最高分」的站次（見 check-season-intros.py clinch verifier）

claims.text: 還剩 6 站便鎖定衛冕
claims.source: clinch 計算：全季站數 17 − 封王站次 11 ＝ 6（同上 verifier）
sqlite: SELECT points FROM driver_standings WHERE season=2002 AND position=1

claims.text: 第二名隊友 Rubens Barrichello 77 分
claims.source: sqlite: SELECT points FROM driver_standings WHERE season=2002 AND position=2
